title: SPOT-OD v1.2.9 post-import DOI synchronization
description: Post-import DOI synchronization release for SPOT-OD v1.2.9-post-import-doi-sync. This release syncs the manuscript and reproducibility text after v1.2.8 was published and Zenodo assigned DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20840386 to the clean v1.2.8 record. It records the v1.2.8 GitHub release, Zenodo record, DOI, concept DOI, target commit, asset name, asset size, and SHA-256 in the manuscript/table text, and treats DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20839901 only as the superseded metadata-inconsistent v1.2.7 import. The manuscript does not rely on any v1.2.9 DOI, release commit, asset hash, or asset size; this release exists only to synchronize post-v1.2.8 DOI text. The evidence scope remains bounded: the v1.2.8 clarification adds no new scientific validation and is not operational POD, not public precise-reference validation, not independent-machine reproduction, not a full raw/training/all-filter rerun, not standalone learned recursive filtering, not isolated message-passing evidence, and not broad learned-OD validation.
notes: This v1.2.9 follow-up syncs manuscript/reproducibility wording after v1.2.8 was published at https://github.com/Alavi1412/spot-od-reproduction/releases/tag/v1.2.8-residual-refine-figure-archive-fix and Zenodo assigned DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20840386. The concept DOI is 10.5281/zenodo.20768672. The earlier DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20839901 is cited only as the superseded metadata-inconsistent v1.2.7 import, where visible metadata retained stale v1.2.5 title/version text while the file was v1.2.7. The manuscript does not rely on any v1.2.9 DOI, release commit, asset hash, or asset size; this release exists only to synchronize post-v1.2.8 DOI text. This is manuscript/release-metadata synchronization only and adds no new scientific validation.
